Off Calendar Jul-27-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Kyle Nordrehaug of Blumenthal Nordrehaug & Bhowmik (858-551-1223) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

Attorney, Lisa M. Hird Chung of Duane Morris LLP (619-744-2225) appears telephonically as counsel for defendant/non-opposing party

The matter is called for hearing. Court finds no objection present.

PLAINTIFF EDGAR RENAZCO'S Motion For Award Of Attorneys Fees, Costs And Service Award is GRANTED. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR #11332, Bus. Tel: 415-551-3745. (D302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Approval Of Class Settlement
Off Calendar Jul-27-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Kyle Nordrehaug of Blumenthal Nordrehaug & Bhowmik (858-551-1223) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

Attorney, Lisa M. Hird Chung of Duane Morris LLP (619-744-2225) appears telephonically as counsel for defendant/non-opposing party

The matter is called for hearing. Court finds no objection present.

PLAINTIFF EDGAR RENAZCO, AN INDIVIDUAL, ON BEHALF OF HIMSELF Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement is GRANTED. Settlement is approved. Written order and judgment are signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR #11332, Bus. Tel: 415-551-3745. (D302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-23-2016 Continued To Sep-14-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Settlement
Off Calendar Mar-21-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. KYLE NORDREHAUG, ESQ. of Blumenthal, Nordrehaug & Bhowmik, Tel No. 858-551-1223 appearing telephonically for the Plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

The Court's tentative ruling required parties to appear at hearing. Matter discussed by Court and counsel. The Court orders as follows: PLAINTIFF EDGAR RENAZCO'S Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Settlement is granted with the modification that the Court will permit objections to be made up to and including the time of the final approval hearing. The Court sets a Final Approval Hearing for July 27, 2016 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion. All dates and deadlines shall be triggered by the 7/27/16 hearing date. Plaintiff shall revise his proposed order and resubmit it to the Court at the e-mail address contestdept302tr@sftc.org. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
